subject: reading
title: Grade 3 ELA — Released Practice
instructions: Released-form sample. Choose the best answer for each question.

questions.questionText: Based on the passage, why was Tony interested in marionettes?
options: A He liked to watch big parades.
B He wanted to take care of animals.
C He was curious about how things moved.
D He was interested in writing puppet shows.
questions.explanation: From the released form answer key.

questions.questionText: Based on paragraphs 2–4, what does the diagram mainly show?
options: A how the invention was like a puppet
B why feeding chickens was a hard chore
C how the invention was supposed to work
D why feeding chickens was done in the morning

params.alt: Diagram showing a pulley system to feed chickens.

questions.explanation: From the released form answer key.

questions.questionText:
Read the sentence from paragraph 5 in the box below.

Word soon spread about Tony’s amazing marionettes.

What does the sentence suggest about Tony’s marionettes?
options: A They became very popular.
B They became very expensive.
C They were changed over the years.
D They were copied by other people.
questions.explanation: From the released form answer key.

questions.questionText: Based on the passage, why did Macy’s decide to use puppets instead of live animals in the parade?
options: A Live animals bored some people.
B Live animals scared some people.
C Live animals cost too much to use.
D Live animals became too tired to walk.
questions.explanation: From the released form answer key.

questions.questionText: Based on paragraph 21, why did Tony think the puppets needed to be bigger and fly higher?
options: A so that the puppets would look more real
B so that people could see the puppets better
C so that people could stand under the puppets
D so that the puppets would look more beautiful
questions.explanation: From the released form answer key.

questions.questionText: What does the question in paragraph 23 mainly show?
options: A what Tony wrote
B that Tony was upset
C what Tony wondered
D that Tony was confused
questions.explanation: From the released form answer key.

questions.questionText: In paragraph 28, how did Tony most likely feel?
options: A lonely
B nervous
C grumpy
D disappointed
questions.explanation: From the released form answer key.

questions.questionText:
Read the sentence from paragraph 30 in the box below.

Then, one by one, Tony cut the lines to the sandbags . . .

Based on the passage, what did Tony’s action show?
options: A The parade was late.
B Tony was going home.
C The parade was beginning.
D Tony was popping the balloons.
questions.explanation: From the released form answer key.

questions.questionText: In paragraph 7, what does “danced across the stage as if by magic” suggest about the marionettes?
options: A They seemed tired.
B They seemed alive.
C They moved loudly.
D They moved quickly.
questions.explanation: From the released form answer key.

questions.questionText: In the paragraph, which of the following words is a noun?
options: A such
B decided
C every
D holiday
questions.explanation: From the released form answer key.

questions.questionText: Based on the passage, explain how the author shows that Tony was a clever person. Support your answer with important information from the passage.
questions.explanation: From the released form answer key.

questions.questionText: Based on paragraph 2 of the article, why do penguins “shoot up out of the water”?
options: A to hide
B to hunt
C to breathe
D to exercise
questions.explanation: From the released form answer key.

questions.questionText: Based on the article, which would be the best heading for paragraphs 1–3?
options: A Big Birds
B On the Move
C On Their Own
D A Meal Fit for a King
questions.explanation: From the released form answer key.

questions.questionText: Based on the article, which of the following happens last?
options: A The female penguin lays an egg.
B The male penguin goes to the ocean to eat.
C The male penguin protects the egg with his feet.
D The female penguin comes back from the ocean.
questions.explanation: From the released form answer key.

questions.questionText: Based on the article and the poem, why do male penguins put their eggs and chicks on their feet?
options: A The ice is very cold.
B The sun is very bright.
C The young penguins are shy.
D The other penguins are dangerous.
questions.explanation: From the released form answer key.

questions.questionText: Based on the article, which word could be used instead of plunge?
options: A fly
B turn
C dive
D look
questions.explanation: From the released form answer key.

questions.questionText: According to the text, which choice describes a beaver’s tail?
options: It is three feet long and weighs forty or fifty pounds.
It has small scales similar to those of a fish.
It is covered with shiny, brown fur.
It looks like a hairy rudder on a boat.
questions.explanation: From the released form answer key.

questions.questionText: What is the meaning of the word bear in paragraph 2?
options: accept
carry
uncover
earn
questions.explanation: From the released form answer key.

questions.questionText: According to the text, what step follows finishing the foundation when building a beaver dam?
options: gathering sticks and logs
piling stones and mud on top
watching which way the stream runs
checking to see if it is strong and safe
questions.explanation: From the released form answer key.

questions.questionText: What is the connection between paragraphs 5 and 6?
options: They present a problem and offer a solution.
They explain a cause-effect relationship.
They present a sequence for building.
They compare habits of wise beavers.
questions.explanation: From the released form answer key.

questions.questionText: Why do beavers carefully inspect a dam after building it?
options: Beavers need to build a bridge to get across the stream.
Beavers know that water will wash away a weak dam.
Beavers want to find the best place to build a house or village.
Beavers make the walls of their houses with big sticks.
questions.explanation: From the released form answer key.
